item.description:
## Recappi Mini v1.0.115

### Fixed

- Polished the Settings window after the v1.0.114 redesign.
- Removed the oversized page header banner from Settings panes.
- Settings panes now size from their measured content height instead of relying on fixed pane heights.
- Corrected the Settings pane padding so grouped rows use the system spacing without an extra inset layer.

### Validation

- Verified the local build across General, Account, Permissions, Transcription, and About.
- Ran `swift build`.
- Ran `swift test` (254 tests, 1 skipped, 0 failures).
- Ran `./scripts/build-app.sh`.
- Ran `git diff --check`.
